documents.semantic_id: Postmortem 2026-02-16: Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node

sections.text:
## Impact
Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.

## Timeline
Rolling deployments are causing a 2-3 second error spike because readiness probes lag behind container start. The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. Ingress controller is returning 502s intermittently; config reload timing is racing with upstream rotation.

## Root cause
The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node.

## Action items
HPA keeps scaling up then immediately back down — the target CPU is oscillating around the threshold. Ingress controller is returning 502s intermittently; config reload timing is racing with upstream rotation.

sections.text:
## Impact
Grafana dashboard for the checkout funnel lost its data source binding after the Grafana 10 upgrade.

documents.semantic_id: Postmortem 2026-04-18: OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong

sections.text:
## Impact
Service accounts need to support client_credentials grant for the new partner integration.

## Timeline
Refresh token rotation broke after the move to Keycloak 24 — tokens issued before the upgrade are being rejected. Audit log entries for failed MFA challenges are missing the user_agent field. Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout.

## Root cause
JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed. OIDC discovery URL returns 502 from behind the load balancer; the health check path is wrong.

## Action items
Rate-limit the /auth/otp endpoint to 5 requests per minute per email; currently it's unbounded. JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.

sections.text:

documents.semantic_id: Postmortem 2026-02-24: SOC 2 auditor flagged that our secret rotation for AWS IAM keys is quarterly, not monthly

sections.text:
## Impact
Pen test found an IDOR in the /api/users/:id endpoint — we're checking auth but not scope.

## Timeline
Vault token TTL is 30d but the auto-renew cron only runs weekly — tokens expire mid-week sometimes. A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated. Incident: an admin token was committed to a public gist. Rotated, scoped all tokens down.

## Root cause
A leaked .env file made it to a contributor's fork on GitHub; the key has been revoked and rotated. SBOM generation for the release pipeline needs to include Rust crates, not just Go + npm.

## Action items
Vault token TTL is 30d but the auto-renew cron only runs weekly — tokens expire mid-week sometimes. Our SSO IdP is Okta, and the metadata URL rotated without notice. All logins failed for 8 minutes.
sections.title: Postmortem

documents.semantic_id: Postmortem 2025-12-17: Invoice PDF generation times out for customers with > 500 line items — need to paginate

sections.text:
## Impact
Usage-based metering events are being counted twice on retry when the initial request times out.

## Timeline
EU VAT calculation is off by the rounding rule — we round per-line, Stripe rounds per-invoice. Credit notes issued via the dashboard are not syncing back to QuickBooks. Annual plan renewal should create a draft invoice 7 days before renewal, not 3.

## Root cause
Invoice PDF generation times out for customers with > 500 line items — need to paginate. Coupon redemptions are not being deduplicated — same code can be applied twice in the same checkout.

## Action items
Failed payment retry cadence needs to match Dunning best practices: day 1, 3, 5, 7, then cancel. Annual plan renewal should create a draft invoice 7 days before renewal, not 3.

documents.semantic_id: Postmortem 2025-11-23: Vacuum is lagging on the events table — autovacuum thresholds are too conservative

sections.text:
## Impact
The daily snapshot job failed because the backup role lost the SELECT grant on the new partitions.

## Timeline
Postgres migration 0042 adds a NOT NULL column without a default; backfill will take 4 hours on prod. pgBouncer transaction pooling breaks our use of SET LOCAL statement_timeout. Connection pool exhaustion at peak — pgbouncer is set to 100 but we're seeing 120 concurrent connections.

## Root cause
The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query. Alembic downgrade path for migration 0038 is broken — it references a column that was renamed in 0041.

## Action items
JSONB query on the metadata column isn't hitting the GIN index. Query planner picks seq scan. The users_org_idx partial index is not being used by the planner on the member-list query.

JWTs issued by the old service had 1h expiry; the new service defaults to 15m and nothing renewed.

## Root cause
Refresh token rotation broke after the move to Keycloak 24 — tokens issued before the upgrade are being rejected. Session cookie SameSite setting needs to change from Lax to Strict before the Firefox 122 rollout.

## Action items
Rate-limit the /auth/otp endpoint to 5 requests per minute per email; currently it's unbounded. Service accounts need to support client_credentials grant for the new partner integration.
